title: Codebook Generation
summary: Generate a static codebook-style interpretation from a selected course so the input-to-output flow is easy to understand.
emptyOutputText: Select a course and generate codebook insights to see the structured output.

groupedInsights.title: Pacing Issues
groupedInsights.summary: Students describe the pacing as rushed and the amount of material as difficult to process within a single lecture.

groupedInsights.title: Cognitive Load
groupedInsights.summary: Students suggest that unclear instructions make it harder to follow expectations and increase mental effort during coursework.

groupedInsights.title: Materials & Assignments
groupedInsights.summary: Students see value in the assignments, but they want stronger alignment between lecture content, examples, and expected outcomes.

teachingInsights: Students feel lectures are rushed and content-heavy.
Instructions are difficult to follow, increasing cognitive load.
Assignments are effective but could better align with lectures.
teachingActions: Introduce pauses or checkpoints during teaching.
